body.class: bg-slate-950 text-slate-100 font-sans antialiased overflow-x-hidden selection:bg-cyan-500/30 selection:text-white

div.class: hidden overflow-hidden w-0 h-0 opacity-0 pointer-events-none

header.class: fixed top-0 inset-x-0 bg-slate-950/80 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-slate-900 z-50 px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8

div.class: max-w-7xl mx-auto h-16 sm:h-20 flex items-center justify-between
w-10 h-10 rounded-xl bg-gradient-to-tr from-cyan-500 to-indigo-600 flex items-center justify-center font-bold text-white shadow shadow-cyan-500/20

span.class: font-display font-bold tracking-widest text-sm uppercase text-white hover:text-cyan-400 transition-colors

nav.class: hidden md:flex items-center gap-6 lg:gap-8 font-mono text-[11px] uppercase tracking-widest text-slate-400

button.class: md:hidden p-2 text-slate-400 hover:text-cyan-400 cursor-pointer transition-colors

div.class: md:hidden bg-slate-950 border-b border-slate-900 font-mono text-center pb-6 uppercase tracking-widest text-xs space-y-4

section.class: relative min-h-screen pt-24 pb-16 flex flex-col justify-center overflow-hidden bg-slate-950 text-slate-100
section.style: background-image: linear-gradient(to bottom, rgba(2, 6, 23, 0.4) 0%, rgba(2, 6, 23, 0.2) 60%, rgba(2, 6, 23, 0.85) 90%, rgba(2, 6, 23, 1) 100%), linear-gradient(to right, rgba(2, 6, 23, 0.6) 0%, rgba(2, 6, 23, 0.15) 50%, rgba(2, 6, 23, 0.65) 100%), url('https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/d/1WboGD1hFTt5gbSiTXTjmNW8XdkpRrFEQ'); background-size: cover; background-position: center; background-attachment: scroll;

div.class: absolute -bottom-40 left-[-10%] w-[120%] h-80 bg-cyan-500/10 rounded-[100%] blur-[80px] pointer-events-none
max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 relative z-10 w-full
flex flex-col items-start justify-center text-left max-w-3xl space-y-8
space-y-6 flex flex-col items-start
space-y-4 flex flex-col items-start

h1.class: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-7xl font-extrabold tracking-tight text-white leading-tight

p.class: text-sm sm:text-base md:text-lg text-slate-300 leading-relaxed font-sans font-light max-w-2xl

div.p: Asset & Data Coordinator, Project Support Specialist, and IoT Developer with over 15 years within telecom engineering. Bridging physical infrastructure with modern digital assets system.

div.class: px-6 py-3.5 bg-slate-900/40 border-l-4 border-cyan-500 rounded-r-lg max-w-2xl backdrop-blur-md

p.class: text-xs sm:text-sm font-mono text-cyan-300 uppercase tracking-widest

div.class: flex flex-wrap justify-start items-center gap-4 w-full

a.class: group relative inline-flex items-center gap-3 w-48 justify-center py-4 rounded-xl font-mono text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-cyan-400 bg-slate-950/60 hover:bg-slate-900 border border-cyan-400/30 hover:border-cyan-400 cursor-pointer transition-all duration-300 active:scale-95 select-none overflow-hidden hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(6,182,212,0.15)]

group relative inline-flex items-center gap-3 w-48 justify-center py-4 rounded-xl font-mono text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-cyan-400 bg-slate-950/60 hover:bg-slate-900 border border-cyan-400/30 hover:border-cyan-400 cursor-pointer transition-all duration-300 active:scale-95 select-none overflow-hidden hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(6,182,212,0.15)]

div.class: hidden lg:grid grid-cols-5 gap-6 mt-20 pt-8 border-t border-slate-900/40 text-left font-mono

span.class: block text-[10px] text-slate-500 tracking-wider
block text-2xl font-black text-white
block text-[10px] text-slate-500 tracking-wider
block text-2xl font-black text-white
block text-[10px] text-slate-500 tracking-wider
block text-2xl font-black text-white
block text-[10px] text-slate-500 tracking-wider
block text-2xl font-black text-white
block text-[10px] text-slate-500 tracking-wider
block text-2xl font-black text-white

section.class: py-14 bg-slate-950 text-slate-100 border-t border-slate-900 relative

div.class: max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8
text-center max-w-3xl mx-auto mb-10

h2.class: text-3xl sm:text-4xl lg:text-5xl font-extrabold text-white tracking-tight font-display uppercase

div.class: w-16 h-1 bg-cyan-400 mx-auto mt-4 rounded-full
grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-10 items-start
lg:col-span-4 flex flex-col items-center gap-6
relative w-72 h-72 lg:w-full lg:aspect-square max-w-[340px] rounded-3xl overflow-hidden border border-cyan-500/30 bg-slate-900/40 shadow-[0_10px_35px_rgba(6,182,212,0.15)] relative
absolute inset-4 bg-gradient-to-tr from-cyan-500/10 to-blue-600/10 rounded-full filter blur-[40px] opacity-60 pointer-events-none
absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-t from-slate-950 via-slate-950/10 to-transparent pointer-events-none z-10

img.class: w-full h-full object-cover object-top select-none hover:scale-105 transition-transform duration-500 relative z-0

div.class: w-full max-w-[340px] grid grid-cols-3 gap-2 text-center
p-2.5 rounded-xl bg-slate-900/40 border border-slate-800

span.class: block text-[8px] font-mono text-slate-500 uppercase tracking-widest leading-none mb-1

div.class: text-sm font-bold text-white leading-none font-display

span.class: block text-[8px] text-slate-400 mt-1 uppercase

div.class: p-2.5 rounded-xl bg-slate-900/40 border border-slate-800

span.class: block text-[8px] font-mono text-slate-500 uppercase tracking-widest leading-none mb-1

div.class: text-sm font-bold text-cyan-400 leading-none font-display

span.class: block text-[8px] text-slate-400 mt-1 uppercase

div.class: p-2.5 rounded-xl bg-slate-900/40 border border-slate-800

span.class: block text-[8px] font-mono text-slate-500 uppercase tracking-widest leading-none mb-1

div.class: text-sm font-bold text-emerald-400 leading-none font-display

span.class: block text-[8px] text-slate-400 mt-1 uppercase

div.class: lg:col-span-8 flex flex-col gap-6
p-6 sm:p-8 rounded-3xl bg-slate-900/60 border border-slate-800 shadow-[0_10px_30px_rgba(0,0,0,0.5)] animate-fade-in
flex items-center gap-2.5 mb-4
w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-cyan-400 animate-pulse

span.class: text-xs font-mono font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-cyan-400

p.class: text-sm sm:text-base text-slate-300 leading-relaxed text-justify font-sans

div.p: Sarjana Teknik Informatika dengan pengalaman lebih dari 15 tahun di bidang telekomunikasi, engineering, asset management, project support, maintenance, data management, dan pengembangan sistem digital. Berpengalaman dalam pengelolaan data aset, administrasi dan koordinasi proyek, pelaporan operasional, monitoring KPI, analisis data, preventive & corrective maintenance, serta implementasi solusi berbasis Internet of Things (IoT) dan aplikasi web.

p.class: text-sm sm:text-base text-slate-300 leading-relaxed text-justify mt-4 font-sans

div.p: Memiliki kemampuan yang kuat dalam project coordination, reporting, komunikasi pemangku kepentingan, troubleshooting, process improvement, dan pengelolaan dokumentasi. Terbiasa bekerja secara mandiri maupun dalam tim lintas fungsi untuk mendukung kelancaran operasional dan menjaga akurasi data proyek.

div.class: mt-6 pt-5 border-t border-slate-800 flex flex-wrap gap-2

span.class: px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-[10px] font-mono font-bold tracking-wider bg-slate-950 text-cyan-400 border border-slate-800
px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-[10px] font-mono font-bold tracking-wider bg-slate-950 text-cyan-400 border border-slate-800
px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-[10px] font-mono font-bold tracking-wider bg-slate-950 text-cyan-400 border border-slate-800
px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-[10px] font-mono font-bold tracking-wider bg-slate-950 text-cyan-400 border border-slate-800
px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-[10px] font-mono font-bold tracking-wider bg-slate-950 text-cyan-400 border border-slate-800

div.class: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-4
flex flex-col gap-3 p-5 rounded-2xl bg-slate-900/20 border border-slate-900
p-2.5 rounded-xl bg-slate-950 border border-slate-800 text-cyan-400 w-fit h-fit

div.p: Pengalaman lapangan mengawal kestabilan suplai catu daya menara telekomunikasi (AC/DC).

div.class: flex flex-col gap-3 p-5 rounded-2xl bg-slate-900/20 border border-slate-900
p-2.5 rounded-xl bg-slate-950 border border-slate-800 text-cyan-400 w-fit h-fit

div.p: Akurasi database data aset menara 15+ tahun dengan tingkat validasi dan verifikasi fisik 100%.

div.class: flex flex-col gap-3 p-5 rounded-2xl bg-slate-900/20 border border-slate-900
p-2.5 rounded-xl bg-slate-950 border border-slate-800 text-cyan-400 w-fit h-fit

div.p: Mengembangkan sensor monitor real-time ACPDB terintegrasi web modern berbasis NodeMCU.

section.class: py-14 bg-slate-950 text-slate-100 border-t border-slate-900 relative

div.class: max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8
text-center max-w-3xl mx-auto mb-8

h2.class: text-3xl sm:text-4xl lg:text-5xl font-black text-white tracking-widest font-display uppercase

div.class: w-16 h-1 bg-cyan-400/80 mx-auto mt-4 rounded-full

p.class: mt-4 text-xs sm:text-sm text-slate-400 leading-relaxed max-w-2xl mx-auto tracking-wide

div.p: Matriks Keahlian Fungsional dan Kemandirian Kerja Operasional Berpengalaman untuk Mengawal Performa Sistem Data Terintegrasi.

div.class: max-w-md mx-auto mb-10 relative

input.placeholder: Cari keahlian (contoh: Excel, IoT, K3, Jaringan, dll)...

flex-1 min-w-0

div.class: w-16 h-1 bg-cyan-400 mx-auto mt-4 rounded-full

p.class: mt-4 text-xs sm:text-sm text-slate-400 leading-relaxed max-w-2xl mx-auto

div.p: Karir profesional mandiri selama lebih dari 15 tahun mengawal kestabilan sistem data aset, operasional lapangan, dan inovasi telekomunikasi digital.

div.class: w-16 h-1 bg-cyan-400 mx-auto mt-4 rounded-full

p.class: mt-4 text-xs sm:text-sm text-slate-400 leading-relaxed max-w-2xl mx-auto

div.p: Solusi digital, rancangan hardware telekomunikasi, IoT, dan otomasi spreadsheet untuk efektivitas proses bisnis operasional.

div.class: flex flex-wrap justify-center items-center gap-2.5 mb-8

button.x-bind:class: projectFilter === 'all' ? 'bg-cyan-500 border-cyan-400 text-slate-950 shadow-md shadow-cyan-500/20' : 'bg-slate-900 border-slate-800 text-slate-400 hover:text-white'
button.class: px-5 py-2.5 rounded-xl text-xs font-bold font-mono tracking-wider border cursor-pointer

button.x-bind:class: projectFilter === 'iot' ? 'bg-cyan-500 border-cyan-400 text-slate-950 shadow-md shadow-cyan-500/20' : 'bg-slate-900 border-slate-800 text-slate-400 hover:text-white'
button.class: px-5 py-2.5 rounded-xl text-xs font-bold font-mono tracking-wider border cursor-pointer

button.x-bind:class: projectFilter === 'web' ? 'bg-cyan-500 border-cyan-400 text-slate-950 shadow-md shadow-cyan-500/20' : 'bg-slate-900 border-slate-800 text-slate-400 hover:text-white'
button.class: px-5 py-2.5 rounded-xl text-xs font-bold font-mono tracking-wider border cursor-pointer

button.x-bind:class: projectFilter === 'security' ? 'bg-cyan-500 border-cyan-400 text-slate-950 shadow-md shadow-cyan-500/20' : 'bg-slate-900 border-slate-800 text-slate-400 hover:text-white'

div.p: Kualifikasi akademik formal S1 Teknik Informatika dengan fokus riset mandiri sistem monitoring kelistrikan telekomunikasi berbasis mikrokontroler.

button.class: py-1.5 rounded text-[10px] font-mono tracking-widest font-bold cursor-pointer transition-all border
button.x-bind:class: loadLevel === 'low' ? 'bg-blue-600/35 border-blue-500 text-white shadow-md' : 'bg-slate-900 hover:bg-slate-850/80 text-slate-400 border-slate-800'

button.class: py-1.5 rounded text-[10px] font-mono tracking-widest font-bold cursor-pointer transition-all border
button.x-bind:class: loadLevel === 'med' ? 'bg-cyan-600/35 border-cyan-500 text-cyan-300 shadow-md' : 'bg-slate-900 hover:bg-slate-850/80 text-slate-400 border-slate-800'

button.class: py-1.5 rounded text-[10px] font-mono tracking-widest font-bold cursor-pointer transition-all border animate-pulse
button.x-bind:class: loadLevel === 'high' ? 'bg-rose-950/40 border-rose-650 text-rose-300 shadow-md' : 'bg-slate-900 hover:bg-slate-850/80 text-slate-400 border-slate-800'

div.class: mt-6 text-[10px] text-slate-500 font-mono flex items-center justify-between

span.class: flex items-center gap-1.5

div.class: mt-16 grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-6 text-left
bg-slate-900/40 backdrop-blur-xs p-5 rounded-xl border border-slate-800/80 shadow-xs hover:border-cyan-500/20 transition-all duration-300
p-2.5 bg-slate-950 border border-slate-800 rounded-lg w-fit mb-3 text-cyan-400

div.p: Pendidikan Berkualitas Berbasis Teknologi & Inovasi

div.class: bg-slate-900/40 backdrop-blur-xs p-5 rounded-xl border border-slate-800/80 shadow-xs hover:border-cyan-500/20 transition-all duration-300
p-2.5 bg-slate-950 border border-slate-800 rounded-lg w-fit mb-3 text-emerald-400

div.p: Kompetensi Akademik Fokus pada Pengembangan Sistem & IoT

div.class: bg-slate-900/40 backdrop-blur-xs p-5 rounded-xl border border-slate-800/80 shadow-xs hover:border-cyan-500/20 transition-all duration-300
p-2.5 bg-slate-950 border border-slate-800 rounded-lg w-fit mb-3 text-indigo-400

div.p: Berorientasi Solusi Analitis, Kreatif, dan Berpikir Sistematis

div.class: bg-slate-900/40 backdrop-blur-xs p-5 rounded-xl border border-slate-800/80 shadow-xs hover:border-cyan-500/20 transition-all duration-300
p-2.5 bg-slate-950 border border-slate-800 rounded-lg w-fit mb-3 text-amber-400

div.p: Siap Berkontribusi untuk Mendukung Inovasi dan Kemajuan Perusahaan

section.class: py-14 bg-slate-950 text-slate-100 border-t border-slate-900 relative

div.class: max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8
text-center max-w-3xl mx-auto mb-10

h2.class: text-3xl sm:text-4xl lg:text-5xl font-extrabold text-white tracking-tight font-display uppercase

div.class: w-16 h-1 bg-cyan-400 mx-auto mt-4 rounded-full

p.class: mt-4 text-xs sm:text-sm text-slate-400 leading-relaxed max-w-2xl mx-auto

div.p: Sertifikasi keahlian terverifikasi di bidang keselamatan kerja (HSE), teknologi informasi jaringan, pengembangan perangkat digital (DevOps/IoT), serta kompetensi intrapersonal.

div.class: grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-2 gap-12 items-stretch mb-16
flex items-center gap-2.5 pb-3.5 border-b border-slate-800

span.class: p-1 px-2.5 text-[8px] bg-cyan-500/10 text-cyan-400 rounded font-bold uppercase font-mono border border-cyan-500/25 shadow-sm

h3.class: text-sm font-bold text-white tracking-tight font-display text-left

div.class: grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 gap-4
flex flex-col justify-between p-5 rounded-2xl bg-slate-900/60 backdrop-blur-xs border border-slate-800 hover:border-cyan-500/30 transition-all duration-300 relative group text-left
absolute top-0 right-0 w-8 h-8 border-t border-r border-cyan-500/15 group-hover:border-cyan-500/25 rounded-tr-2xl pointer-events-none
flex items-start justify-between gap-2.5 mb-4
p-2.5 bg-slate-950 border border-slate-800 rounded-xl

span.class: text-[8px] font-mono font-bold px-2 py-0.5 rounded border

h4.class: text-xs sm:text-sm font-bold text-slate-100 group-hover:text-cyan-400 transition-colors leading-snug

span.class: block text-[10px] font-mono text-cyan-400/80 mt-1 uppercase tracking-tight

p.class: text-[11px] text-slate-400 mt-4 leading-relaxed border-t border-slate-850 pt-3

h3.class: text-sm font-bold text-white tracking-tight font-display text-left

flex flex-col justify-between p-5 rounded-2xl bg-slate-900/60 backdrop-blur-xs border border-slate-800 hover:border-cyan-500/30 transition-all duration-300 relative group text-left
absolute top-0 right-0 w-8 h-8 border-t border-r border-cyan-500/15 group-hover:border-cyan-500/25 rounded-tr-2xl pointer-events-none
flex items-start justify-between gap-2.5 mb-4
p-2.5 bg-slate-950 border border-slate-800 rounded-xl

span.class: text-[8px] font-mono font-bold px-2 py-0.5 rounded border

span.class: block text-[10px] font-mono text-cyan-400/80 mt-1 uppercase tracking-tight

p.class: text-[11px] text-slate-400 mt-4 leading-relaxed border-t border-slate-850 pt-3

div.class: grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-6 pt-10 border-t border-slate-800/65
flex items-center gap-3.5 p-4 rounded-xl bg-slate-900/40 border border-slate-800/80 hover:border-cyan-500/25 transition-all text-left
p-2.5 bg-slate-950 border border-slate-800/80 text-cyan-400 rounded-lg flex-shrink-0

div.p: Sertifikasi nasional & internasional

div.class: flex items-center gap-3.5 p-4 rounded-xl bg-slate-900/40 border border-slate-800/80 hover:border-cyan-500/25 transition-all text-left
p-2.5 bg-slate-950 border border-slate-800/80 text-blue-400 rounded-lg flex-shrink-0

div.p: Konsisten belajar inovasi terbaru

div.class: flex items-center gap-3.5 p-4 rounded-xl bg-slate-900/40 border border-slate-800/80 hover:border-cyan-500/25 transition-all text-left
p-2.5 bg-slate-950 border border-slate-800/80 text-emerald-400 rounded-lg flex-shrink-0

div.class: flex items-center gap-3.5 p-4 rounded-xl bg-slate-900/40 border border-slate-800/80 hover:border-cyan-500/25 transition-all text-left
p-2.5 bg-slate-950 border border-slate-800/80 text-indigo-400 rounded-lg flex-shrink-0

div.p: Siap dedikasi penuh di tim Anda

section.class: py-14 bg-slate-950 text-slate-100 border-t border-slate-900 relative

div.class: max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8
text-center max-w-3xl mx-auto mb-10

h2.class: text-3xl sm:text-4xl lg:text-5xl font-extrabold text-white tracking-tight font-display uppercase

div.class: w-16 h-1 bg-cyan-400 mx-auto mt-4 rounded-full
grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-2 gap-10 items-stretch
space-y-6 text-left flex flex-col justify-between

span.class: text-[9px] font-mono text-cyan-455 tracking-widest font-bold uppercase block

div.p: Terbuka untuk peluang kerjasama profesional, konsultasi digitalisasi data aset infrastruktur, pengembangan sistem monitoring IoT, serta manajemen administrasi proyek terpercaya.

div.class: grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-3 gap-3

a.class: p-4 rounded-xl bg-slate-900 border border-slate-800/80 text-center block group hover:border-cyan-400/30 transition-all

span.class: block text-[8px] font-mono text-slate-500 uppercase tracking-widest font-semibold
block text-[9.5px] font-sans font-medium text-slate-300 mt-1 truncate

a.class: p-4 rounded-xl bg-slate-900 border border-slate-800/80 text-center block group hover:border-cyan-400/30 transition-all

span.class: block text-[8px] font-mono text-slate-500 uppercase tracking-widest font-semibold
block text-[9.5px] font-sans font-medium text-slate-300 mt-1 truncate

div.class: p-4 rounded-xl bg-slate-900 border border-slate-800/80 text-center

span.class: block text-[8px] font-mono text-slate-500 uppercase tracking-widest font-semibold
block text-[9.5px] font-sans font-medium text-slate-300 mt-1 truncate

div.class: p-4.5 rounded-xl border border-cyan-500/10 bg-slate-900/20 text-xs text-slate-400 font-mono text-center

div.div: "Commitment to Safety, Quality Delivery, and Accurate Asset Management Integrity."

div.class: rounded-2xl overflow-hidden border border-slate-800/80 relative min-h-[300px]

iframe.class: w-full h-full min-h-[300px] border-0 outline-none select-none filter invert grayscale opacity-80

footer.class: py-10 bg-slate-950 border-t border-slate-900 font-mono text-[10px] text-slate-500 text-center

div.class: max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 space-y-4
div.p: © 2026 Hadi Suwarno. All Rights Reserved.
